persona.name: Chad Sterling
persona.speech_pattern: Uses terms like 'disruptive', 'pivot', and 'scale' constantly. Very demanding.

hidden_constraints.description: Mid-way through, the client will change the core feature from a 'Social App' to a 'FinTech Dashboard'.
Needs a 'working' prototype in exactly 48 hours for a VC meeting.
Insists on using a specific, niche database because he read a tweet about it.
Demands it must handle 10 million users on day one, even though they have zero customers.
